channel.title: Tutorials on DevOps Adda
channel.description: Recent content in Tutorials on DevOps Adda

item.title: What is DevOps? A Beginner's Guide
item.description: A plain-English introduction to DevOps culture, the delivery lifecycle, and why automation matters.

item.title: Linux Basics for DevOps
item.description: A hands-on intro to the Linux command line for DevOps beginners.

item.title: Git & GitHub Crash Course
item.description: A beginner-friendly crash course on Git and GitHub for DevOps.

item.title: Bash Scripting for Beginners
item.description: Learn Bash scripting fundamentals to automate your DevOps workflows.

item.title: Docker for Absolute Beginners
item.description: A beginner's guide to Docker containers, images, and Docker Compose.

item.title: Cloud Computing Fundamentals
item.description: A beginner's guide to cloud computing concepts for DevOps.

item.title: CI/CD with GitHub Actions
item.description: A hands-on intro to CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions.

item.title: Terraform for Beginners
item.description: An introduction to Infrastructure as Code using Terraform.

item.title: Kubernetes 101
item.description: A beginner's introduction to Kubernetes container orchestration.

item.title: Monitoring with Prometheus & Grafana
item.description: A beginner's guide to monitoring and observability with Prometheus and Grafana.
